title: Dr Louise Newson - Breaking The Cycle: The Power Of Hormones
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Following on from her hugely successful 2024 theatre tour, renowned physician and women’s hormone specialist Dr Louise Newson is back with an unmissable new show challenging everything you’ve been told about hormones.  Hormones are important chemical messengers found throughout your body, telling it what to do and when. They are involved in your growth and development, metabolism, emotions, sexual and reproductive function, sleep and blood pressure. They help you feel happy, sad, furious and everything in between. But how do hormones really work? And how can we harness them for a happier, healthier life? Why is there so much confusion and misunderstanding about hormones? What is the difference between your own hormones and synthetic hormones, including contraceptives, available on prescription?  This is more than a health talk – it is a movement and a wake-up call. This show will help people think differently about hormones as well as learn ways to reclaim their health and confidence. Expect to leave empowered, angry, shocked, energised and ready to demand better.  Pre-show ‘Meet & Greet’ available with the purchase of a premium ticket.

title: The Boy at the Back of the Class
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: A Children’s Theatre Partnership and Rose Theatre production  The Boy at the Back of the Class based on the book by Onjali Q. Raúf  Adapted for the stage by  Nick Ahad              Directed by  Monique Touko  After delighting audiences across the country, and now with a Best Family Show Olivier Award, the smash-hit, this joyful play based on the best-selling novel is back with a celebration of friendship kindness and compassion. There used to be an empty chair at the back of the class, but now a new boy called Ahmet is sitting in it. He’s nine years old (just like me), but he’s very strange. He never talks and never smiles and doesn’t like sweets – not even lemon sherbets, which are my favourite!  After learning that he has fled his own war-torn country, Ahmet’s classmates have ‘The Greatest Idea in the World’ – a magnificent plan to reunite Ahmet with his family. An unexpected and often hilarious adventure follows, all topped off with a terrific twist.  Told from a child’s perspective, balancing heart and humour, The Boy at the Back of the Class highlights the power of good friends and courage in a world that doesn’t always make sense and reminds us that everyone needs a place to call home.  Winner of the Blue Peter Book Award 2019  Winner of the Waterstones Children’s Book Prize 2019

title: David Olusoga: A Gun Through Time
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Have you ever considered how a single weapon could change the course of history? What stories lie behind the guns that shaped empires, wars, and even criminal underworlds? How did these firearms influence not just battles, but entire societies?  Known for his acclaimed documentaries Black and British: A Forgotten History and A House Through Time, as well as his appearance on Celebrity Traitors, David Olusoga  offers remarkable storytelling in this powerful, unexpected and enlightening social narrative.   Join David as he uncovers the story of four firearms that changed the world and the lives of our ancestors.   The Thompson Sub-Machine Gun was the wonder weapon that was supposed to end to the slaughter of the First World War. But in the hands of the gangsters of Prohibition-era American it became the infamous 'Tommy Gun'.  The Maxim gun enabled Europeans to conquer Africa in the 1890s, but 20 years later it became one of the biggest killers in European history when deployed on the Western Front. It is still being used to considerable effect on the battlefields of Ukraine.   The Brown Bess flintlock musket, standard issue to the British Army from the early 18th to mid-19th century, was famously used in conflicts from the American War of Independence to Waterloo, symbolising the height of British imperial military power.   The Lee Enfield rifle was woven into the lives of two generations of our ancestors. With 17 million of them produced it was the weapon the British Army took to war in 1914 and 1939.    See these legendary firearms up close on stage and delve into their mind-bending hidden social histories. You’ll also have the chance ask David your own questions about any historical topic.

title: Walk Right Back
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Immerse yourself in a wave of pure rock and roll nostalgia with Walk Right Back! Presented by the creators of That’ll Be The Day, this show recounts the tale of those two Kentucky boys who created unparalleled vocal magic - The Everly Brothers. Brace yourself for a thrilling journey from their roots in Kentucky to their glorious reunion at London’s Royal Albert Hall, boasting signature guitar riffs and those unforgettable harmonies, and featuring smash-hits like ‘Bye Bye Love,’ ‘Wake Up Little Susie’ and ‘All I Have To Do Is Dream’, each rendition is performed with infectious energy and captures the heartfelt essence of The Everly Brothers.

title: Jasper Carrott
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
Comedy legend Jasper Carrott in a night of comedy heaven with special guests Strictly ABBA 

With a career that spans decades, the indefatigable Jasper continues to tour and leave audiences breathless with laughter. Rightly known as the godfather of British comedy, he brings to this show his trademark razor-sharp wit and charm. One not to be missed! 

Jasper’s Special Guests, Strictly ABBA, add a touch of pure ABBA entertainment. Featuring all the best-loved ABBA songs, Dancing Queen, Waterloo, The Name of the Game, and many, many more!

title: The Rocket Man : A Tribute To Elton John
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: Pack your bags, strap yourself in, zero hour 7.30pm, <8pm for later curtain-ups> for a night like no other as we celebrate Sir Elton John! The Rocket Man is the world’s favourite celebration to a musical icon, playing to audiences all around the world and we are delighted to announce our UK tour for 2025. So, catch a star if you can, and wish for something special as we ask you, are you ready for love?  No one else recreates the flamboyant megastar with as much vigour and brilliance. Join us as The Rocket Man and our amazing live band take you down the Yellow Brick Road with two hours of glorious Elton hits, including, Saturday Night’s Alright, Crocodile Rock, I Guess That’s Why They Call it the Blues, Daniel, I’m Still Standing, Philadelphia Freedom, Your Song and many, many more. With dazzling costumes, stunning vocals and sensational piano solos, we take you on a journey through Elton’s life and career, the highs and the lows with many a laugh brought to life, live on stage. This show has it all! So, if it gets to seven o’clock and you wanna rock, book your tickets now!  The Rocket Man – a magical night in tribute to Sir Elton John UK Tour Tickets on sale now. Don’t miss out!  This is a tribute show and is no way affiliated with any original artists/estates/management companies or similar shows. Promoter reserves the right to alter the programme.

title: The Enormous Crocodile
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription: “For my lunch today I would like… a nice juicy little child!” He’s greedy, he’s grumptious, he’s horrid! The Enormous Crocodile is weaving his way through the jungle to Cardiff in search of delicious little fingers and squidgy podgy knees… Only the other jungle creatures can foil his secret plans and clever tricks, but they’re going to have to find a large amount of courage to stop this greedy brute. This mischievous musical based on Roald Dahl’s snappy book has toe-tapping tunes by Ahmed Abdullahi Gallab, a rib-tickling book and lyrics by Suhayla El-Bushra, and additional music and lyrics by Tom Brady. Developed and directed by Emily Lim, it features a menagerie of puppets by co-director and puppetry designer Toby Olié, with set and costume design by Fly Davis and puppetry co-designed and supervised by Daisy Beattie. Snap up your tickets today for this wickedly funny musical adventure, perfect for the whole family! The Enormous Crocodile played at Theatre Royal Windsor, Regent’s Park Open Air Theatre and The Lowry, and toured the US with performances in Minneapolis and Los Angeles in 2025.  Looking for some half term fun? Follow our illustrated map and discover Roald Dahl spots around Cardiff on a magical family adventure. Complete either the blue or red trail, snap a photo on site, and tag us on socials (@newtheatrecardiff) to unlock an exclusive ticket offer!

title: Alfie Boe
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
Support from Jessica Sweetman One of Britain’s most celebrated and best-loved tenors Alfie Boe, OBE, has announced a brand-new UK tour celebrating his most iconic hits, fan-favourite classics, and powerful new material from his highly anticipated upcoming album, Facing Myself. The tour will see Alfie perform 35 live dates throughout April and May 2026 bringing his unmistakable voice to some of the country’s most prestigious venues. Alfie will also be joined by special guest, singer-songwriter, Jessica Sweetman. Alfie has enjoyed an extraordinary career spanning stage, recording, and television. A hugely successful, multi-platinum selling artist, Alfie has released over a dozen studio albums, several of which have topped the UK charts. His collaborations with Michael Ball — including the record-breaking albums Together, Together Again, and Back Together - have become some of the fastest-selling releases of the decade. Their tours have sold out arenas across the UK, delighting hundreds of thousands of fans. Alfie Boe – Diamond Photo Opportunity VIP Package

title: The Rocky Horror Show
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
Ready to thrill you with fun and naughty moments, Richard O’Brien’s legendary rock ‘n’ roll musical, The Rocky Horror Show comes to Cardiff as part of a new world tour.

Having been seen by over 35 million theatregoers, The Rocky Horror Show is the story of two squeaky clean college kids–Brad and his fiancée Janet. When by a twist of fate, their car breaks down outside a creepy mansion whilst on their way to visit their former college professor, they meet the charismatic Dr Frank-n-Furter. It is an adventure they’ll never forget, filled with fun, frolics, frocks, and frivolity. 

Directed by Christopher Luscombe, The Rocky Horror Show is the biggest party and features timeless classics, including Sweet Transvestite, Dammit Janet, and of course, the pelvic thrusting show stopping Time Warp.

Age recommendation 12+

title: The Magic Of Motown
description: Book your tickets to  at New Theatre Cardiff at the official Trafalgar Tickets, New Theatre Cardiff box office.
shortDescription:
Seen by millions, The Magic of Motown is back with its 20th Anniversary Tour! It’s no surprise that this show is one of the biggest success stories in British theatre history.

Come celebrate as we Reach Out and show you there Ain’t No Mountain High Enough with the biggest Motown party of the year. Get ready for all the hits, glittering costumes, dazzling dance routines and outstanding musicianship in this breath-taking live concert spectacular.

You will be going Loco down in Acapulco as we take you back down memory lane with all the Motown classics from artists such as: Marvin Gaye, Diana Ross, Stevie Wonder, The Temptations, The Supremes, The Four Tops, Martha Reeves, The Jackson 5, Smokey Robinson, and many, many more. Celebrate the sound of a generation with one very special night of The Magic of Motown!

This is a tribute show and is no way affiliated with any original artists/estates/management companies or similar shows. Promoter reserves the right to alter the programme.

description: Rum & Reggae Festival 2026 – The Biggest Caribbean celebration has landed in Cardiff! title: Shangri-La in the Castle: Chris Stussy
description: One of the most influential figures in modern house music, Chris Stussy has firmly established himself as a tastemaker, selector and producer at the forefront of the global scene. Known for his groove-led sound and impeccable track selection, Stussy seamlessly moves between intimate club spaces and major festival stages worldwide. As the founder of the Up The Stuss label and curator of his USS event series, Chris Stussy continues to push club culture forward, putting music front and centre with immersive, distraction-free dancefloor experiences. His recent run of standout shows includes Warehouse Project, KOKO, Club Space, DC10, Hï Ibiza and Amnesia, alongside a sold-out headline show at London’s Roundhouse. Returning to Cardiff following a standout appearance last summer, Stussy now headlines Cardiff Castle for a very special outdoor show — and he’s bringing a heavyweight lineup with him. Joining the bill as special guest is Chloé Caillet, alongside support from L.P.Rhythm, Locklead, and Lauren Lo Sung, with multi-instrumentalist Lewis Taylor opening the night. Expect deep, rolling house music, heavyweight production and an atmosphere built for dancing from start to finish — a proper summer opener in one of the UK’s most iconic live music settings.
shortDescription: Chris Stussy headlines Shang in the Castle with Chloé Caillet, L.P.Rhythm, Locklead, Lauren Lo Sung and Lewis Taylor

title: Ethel Cain
description: American singer-songwriter Ethel Cain will bring her acclaimed Willoughby Tucker Forever tour to Cardiff Castle next summer, joined by special guest Anna von Hausswolff. Following a rapturously received US leg and sell-out shows across the UK in 2025, Cain is stepping up to some of her biggest headline performances yet. Cardiff fans will get the chance to experience the Florida-born artist’s cinematic soundscapes live in the iconic open-air setting of the Castle grounds. Her latest album, Willoughby Tucker, I’ll Always Love You — praised by NME, The Guardian, The New York Times and more — expands on the mythology first introduced in her 2022 breakthrough Preacher’s Daughter, cementing her as one of the most compelling new voices in modern music. Joining her on the night is universally acclaimed Swedish musician and composer Anna von Hausswolff. Her sixth album ICONOCLASTS — which features Ethel Cain on the single Aging Young Women — showcases an artist of vast, unpredictable creativity, always pushing forward and always unmissable live. From intimate beginnings recording in a church basement to international recognition on festival stages, fashion runways and critical “album of the year” lists, Ethel Cain has become a global phenomenon.
shortDescription: Ethel Cain headlines Cardiff Castle with special guest Anna von Hausswolff, as part of her acclaimed Willoughby Tucker Forever tour.

description: Get ready for a boot-stompin’, hat-tippin’ celebration of country music as The Road to Nashville rolls into Cardiff! Experience the world’s best tribute acts performing live, bringing the heart of Music City straight to DEPOT.🤩 Featuring incredible tributes to: ⭐ Morgan Wallen ⭐ Luke Combs ⭐ Dolly Parton ⭐ Shania Twain ⭐ Lainey Wilson ⭐ Chris Stapleton + more… Dust off your cowboy boots and join us for a full day of line dancing, roaming entertainers, and Wild West decor that’ll make you feel right at home on the range.🌵 Indulge in delicious BBQ and smoker food vendors, test your skills at axe throwing and vintage games, or hold on tight for the rodeo bull challenge!🍖 Whether you’re a die-hard country fan or just looking for a great time, this event promises non-stop entertainment, good vibes, and a true taste of Nashville right here in the UK. 🤠 📍 Venue: DEPOT, Cardiff 📅 Date: Saturday 20th June 2026 ⏰ Time: 14:00 – 22:00 Grab your tickets, rally your cowboys and cowgirls, and get ready to hit The Road to Nashville!🎟️

title: Garbage & Skunk Anansie
description: Two icons of alternative rock join forces for a massive co-headline show at Cardiff Castle next summer. Garbage and Skunk Anansie will share the stage on Monday 22 June as part of their joint UK headline tour, performing in some of the country’s most stunning outdoor venues. For this special Cardiff date, Garbage will close the night. Joining the bill is special guest Du Blonde. The alt-rock firebrand – the creative alter ego of multi-instrumentalist Beth Jeans Houghton – has built a reputation for explosive live shows and a fiercely DIY sound, blending fuzz-drenched guitars, punk attitude and power-pop hooks. Expect a night packed with raw energy, unforgettable anthems and three standout forces of alternative music, led by two of the most commanding frontwomen in rock history – Shirley Manson and Skin. Formed in the mid-90s, Garbage became known for their fusion of rock, electronica and grunge, producing era-defining hits like Stupid Girl and Only Happy When It Rains. Their bold sound and Manson’s striking vocals cemented them as one of the decade’s most influential alternative acts. Meanwhile, Skunk Anansie’s explosive mix of hard rock, punk and funk made them one of the UK’s most vital live bands. With hits including Weak, Hedonism (Just Because You Feel Good) and Charlie Big Potato, they continue to electrify audiences worldwide — their latest album The Painful Truth hitting the UK Top 10.
shortDescription: Garbage and Skunk Anansie co-headline Cardiff Castle with special guest Du Blonde for a huge night of alt-rock anthems.
subcategory: Garbage & Skunk Anansie

title: Empire of the Sun
description: Australian electronic icons Empire of the Sun return to the UK this summer with their spectacular Ask That God Tour, landing at Cardiff Castle for one of just three UK headline dates. Known for their genre-defying sound and visually jaw-dropping live shows, Empire of the Sun bring their full-scale, immersive production to the heart of Cardiff. Expect a surreal world of kaleidoscopic visuals, theatrical performance and euphoric synth-pop as Luke Steele and Nick Littlemore deliver one of the most ambitious live shows on the touring circuit. The 2026 tour follows the release of Ask That God, the duo’s first album in eight years. The record marks a bold new chapter, blending existential themes with the dreamlike, nostalgia-tinged sound that has defined Empire of the Sun since day one. Fans can expect tracks from the album alongside era-defining anthems including Walking On A Dream, We Are The People, Alive and High And Low. Empire of the Sun’s recent global tour sold out headline shows across Europe and North America, including landmark performances in London, Paris, New York and Los Angeles, as well as major festival appearances worldwide. Their return to Cardiff promises a rare chance to experience one of the most visually and sonically distinctive live acts of the last two decades in an iconic open-air setting. This is a standout addition to the DEPOT Live 2026 series — and a show not to be missed. 🎟 Tickets Presale opens Thursday 29 January, 10AM General sale from Friday 30 January, 10AM

title: SOLD OUT: Lewis Capaldi
description: Global superstar Lewis Capaldi will head to Blackweir next summer to headline a massive outdoor show – joined by special guest Jacob Alon. After unprecedented demand that saw the biggest ever rush for tickets across both pre-sale and general sale, Lewis Capaldi is currently blazing through a triumphant 200,000-ticket sold out 17-date UK arena tour – and he shows no sign of slowing down as he announces his biggest ever UK and Irish headline shows for next summer, including two huge nights at Blackweir Fields on Tuesday 30th June and Wednesday 1st July. Joining him in Cardiff is BRITs Critics’ Choice and BBC Introducing Award winner Jacob Alon. The Fife-born, Mercury Prize-nominated artist has quickly established themselves as one of the most compelling new voices in contemporary music, earning widespread acclaim for their debut album In Limerence and powerful live performances. With a voice that commands total attention, Jacob Alon is the perfect addition to what promises to be two unforgettable nights. The announcement comes during Lewis’s current sold-out 17-date UK arena tour, his first return to touring in two years, which has been sending fans into overdrive — debuting new songs alongside a run of era-defining hits and serving as a powerful reminder of the connection he commands. The response has been electric, with critics delivering four and five star reviews across the board, continuing this week with a run of three sold-out shows at London’s The O2. Lewis’s return has already seen him top the charts, bagging a monumental sixth UK number 1 single with his comeback track Survive, becoming the fastest-selling single of 2025. The success also marked his biggest ever opening week sales for a single, surpassing both Sabrina Carpenter and Lady Gaga for this year’s biggest opening week, placing him alongside the likes of Beyoncé, Britney Spears, Drake, Lady Gaga and Queen in achieving six UK number 1 singles — and overtaking David Bowie, Katy Perry and The Police in the process.
shortDescription: SOLD OUT: Lewis Capaldi brings his biggest hits and powerful live show to Cardiff’s Blackweir Fields on 30 June 2026.
subcategory: SOLD OUT: Lewis Capaldi

title: SOLD OUT: Katy Perry
description: Global pop superstar Katy Perry is heading to Wales for one of only two exclusive UK shows next summer – and she’s bringing a full-scale, hit-packed spectacle to the grounds of Cardiff Castle. With more than 115 billion streams, 70 million albums sold and a record-breaking list of RIAA Diamond-certified singles (including Firework, Dark Horse, Roar and California Gurls), Katy Perry stands as one of the biggest artists of all time. Her latest album 143 stormed into the Top 10 on both sides of the Atlantic, while her new single bandaids is already making waves. Joining Katy on the night is Mimi Webb — the BRIT Award-nominated singer-songwriter from Canterbury whose skyscraper-size vocals and emotionally charged pop have earned her over a billion streams worldwide. With two acclaimed albums under her belt — Amelia (Top 5 UK Albums Chart) and her latest Confessions — plus sold-out tours across multiple continents, Mimi is one of the most exciting live acts in British music right now. Expect a night loaded with huge anthems, unmatched energy and the larger-than-life performance only Katy can deliver. Speaking ahead of the show, she said: “What’s up Wales? I can’t wait to see you guys and we’ll have a party you’ll never forget. It will be epic.” This unmissable date forms part of TK Maxx presents DEPOT Live at Cardiff Castle 2026, presented by DEPOT Live and Cuffe & Taylor.

title: Lewis Capaldi – Extra Date
description: Global superstar Lewis Capaldi will head to Blackweir next summer to headline a massive outdoor show – joined by special guest Jacob Alon. After unprecedented demand that saw the biggest ever rush for tickets across both pre-sale and general sale, Lewis Capaldi is currently blazing through a triumphant 200,000-ticket sold out 17-date UK arena tour – and he shows no sign of slowing down as he announces his biggest ever UK and Irish headline shows for next summer, including two huge nights at Blackweir Fields on Tuesday 30th June and Wednesday 1st July. Joining him in Cardiff is BRITs Critics’ Choice and BBC Introducing Award winner Jacob Alon. The Fife-born, Mercury Prize-nominated artist has quickly established themselves as one of the most compelling new voices in contemporary music, earning widespread acclaim for their debut album In Limerence and powerful live performances. With a voice that commands total attention, Jacob Alon is the perfect addition to what promises to be two unforgettable nights. The announcement comes during Lewis’s current sold-out 17-date UK arena tour, his first return to touring in two years, which has been sending fans into overdrive — debuting new songs alongside a run of era-defining hits and serving as a powerful reminder of the connection he commands. The response has been electric, with critics delivering four and five star reviews across the board, continuing this week with a run of three sold-out shows at London’s The O2. Lewis’s return has already seen him top the charts, bagging a monumental sixth UK number 1 single with his comeback track Survive, becoming the fastest-selling single of 2025. The success also marked his biggest ever opening week sales for a single, surpassing both Sabrina Carpenter and Lady Gaga for this year’s biggest opening week, placing him alongside the likes of Beyoncé, Britney Spears, Drake, Lady Gaga and Queen in achieving six UK number 1 singles — and overtaking David Bowie, Katy Perry and The Police in the process.
shortDescription: Global superstar Lewis Capaldi will headline a second massive outdoor show in Cardiff next summer due to overwhelming demand.
subcategory: Lewis Capaldi – Extra Date

title: Bowling for Soup vs. Frank Turner & The Sleeping Souls
description: Two giants of the alternative scene are joining forces for one massive summer night in Cardiff – and they’re bringing special guests American Hi-Fi with them. Texan pop-punk icons Bowling For Soup and folk-punk powerhouse Frank Turner & The Sleeping Souls team up for the first time ever, bringing their Bowl My Bones UK tour to TK Maxx presents DEPOT Live at Cardiff Castle. Joining the bill are American Hi-Fi, celebrating 25 years as a band and making their long-awaited return to the UK. Best known for huge early-2000s hits like Flavor Of The Weak, The Art Of Losing and The Geeks Get The Girls, they add another layer of nostalgia and energy to an already stacked lineup. What started as an unlikely friendship between frontmen Jaret Reddick and Frank Turner has grown into years of collaboration, camaraderie, and fan demand for a joint tour. Now it’s finally happening – and Cardiff gets one of the biggest dates. Expect huge singalongs, feel-good chaos, heartfelt anthems and three back-to-back sets from artists who turn every show into a celebration. Bowling For Soup bring decades of hits, humour and high-energy pop-punk, Frank Turner arrives with an unmatched live reputation and his full band The Sleeping Souls, while American Hi-Fi deliver the kind of era-defining tracks that defined a generation. This is more than a double bill – it’s a full-throttle summer night built on community, connection and the joy of live music in one of the UK’s most iconic outdoor venues.
shortDescription: Bowling For Soup and Frank Turner & The Sleeping Souls bring their Bowl My Bones Tour to Cardiff Castle. Support from American Hi-Fi.
subcategory: Bowling for Soup vs. Frank Turner & The Sleeping Souls

title: Billy Ocean
description: With a career spanning over five decades, Billy Ocean has sold more than 30 million records worldwide and earned his place among the most celebrated voices in British pop and soul. Fans can look forward to classics including Caribbean Queen (No More Love On The Run), When The Going Gets Tough, The Tough Get Going, Red Light Spells Danger, Get Outta My Dreams, Get Into My Car and Love Really Hurts Without You – all performed with the unmistakable energy and charm that’s made Billy a true legend of the stage. Joining him in Cardiff is Marti Pellow, the unmistakable voice of Wet Wet Wet and one of the UK’s best-loved performers. Expect to sing along to Sweet Little Mystery, Goodnight Girl, Love Is All Around and more as Marti brings his signature mix of pop, soul, and showmanship to this summer spectacular. Set against the stunning backdrop of Cardiff Castle, this will be a night packed with nostalgia, feel-good anthems, and world-class performances from two of the most iconic voices in British music.
shortDescription: Pop and soul legend Billy Ocean headlines Cardiff Castle on 9 July 2026. With very special guest Marti Pellow.
subcategory: Billy Ocean

title: Indie Beer Fest Wales 2026
description: Wales’s independent brewing scene is thriving — and this summer, it’s all coming together under one roof. The Indie Beer Wales Festival 2026 is a brand-new three-day event taking place right here at DEPOT Cardiff, bringing together over 35 independent Welsh breweries for a weekend of discovery, conversation, and seriously great beer. Whether you’re a diehard cask aficionado or just starting to explore the world of craft beer, there’s something here for everyone. With 150+ beers on pour — keg and cask — you’ll have plenty of room to roam, taste, and find your new favourite. What’s included 150+ beers from 35+ independent Welsh breweries — keg and cask Live music & DJs throughout the weekend Street food to keep you fuelled all day A pint glass + beer token included with every ticket to get you started Three days. Three sessions. One unforgettable celebration of Welsh brewing culture. Come for a session, stay for the weekend — however you enjoy it, this is a summer event you won’t want to miss.
shortDescription: The first ever celebration of independent Welsh brewing — 150+ beers, live music & street food. Three days. One roof.
subcategory: Indie Beer Fest Wales 2026

title: Bastille with Arthur Hill + Sofia Camara
description: Bastille head to Cardiff Castle in July for a huge outdoor headline show in the heart of the Welsh capital. One of the UK’s biggest and most loved bands of the last decade, Bastille have built a global following with their soaring alt-pop sound, emotional songwriting and unforgettable live performances. From the breakout success of Pompeii to fan favourites like Things We Lost In The Fire, Good Grief and Happier, the band’s catalogue has soundtracked a generation. Fronted by Dan Smith, Bastille have earned multiple BRIT nominations, topped charts around the world and amassed billions of streams across their career. Their powerful mix of cinematic production, anthemic choruses and introspective lyrics has made them one of the defining British bands of modern pop. Renowned for their electric live shows, Bastille bring an atmosphere that turns every performance into a shared moment with the crowd — huge singalongs, emotional highs and festival-sized energy from start to finish. Joining them for this special Cardiff Castle show are Arthur Hill and rising pop star Sofia Camara, making this one of the standout nights of the summer. Set within the historic walls of Cardiff Castle, this open-air show promises an unforgettable evening of anthems, atmosphere and one of the UK’s biggest live acts.
shortDescription: Bastille headline Cardiff Castle with support from Arthur Hill and Sofia Camara. Experience them live in the heart of Cardiff.

title: David Gray – Past & Present Tour
description: With special guest The Divine Comedy Following a run of 68 sold-out shows across the USA, Australia, UK and Ireland in 2025, multi-platinum artist David Gray has announced a brand-new summer date in Cardiff as part of his Past & Present World Tour. On Saturday 11th July 2026, Cardiff Castle will host the closing show of Gray’s UK & Ireland run – a night set to be nothing short of spectacular. Joining him will be very special guest The Divine Comedy, bringing an extra layer of magic to this one-off evening. The tour has already taken in legendary venues such as London’s Royal Albert Hall, Glasgow’s SEC Armadillo, Manchester’s O2 Apollo and Dublin’s 3Arena, as well as a celebrated headline slot at Electric Picnic. His latest album Dear Life has been praised as some of his most powerful and emotive work since White Ladder, showcasing Gray’s enduring artistry as one of the UK’s most influential singer-songwriters. Don’t miss your chance to experience an unforgettable night of music in the iconic surroundings of Cardiff Castle. Tickets: Presale: Thursday 4th September, 10am General Sale: Friday 5th September, 10am

description:
The Cycle Continues... 
Bandito’s we need your help, we need to find Clancy.
As you know last year during the City Walls battle, we lost Clancy. And in the words of Torchbearer:
“That’s not Clancy up there anymore. He’s out there somewhere. And we will try again.”
So now it is time for us, to try again.
We are gathering the Cardiff Bandito’s at Clwb Ifor Bach on May 8th and together we will try to find Clancy.
You are encouraged to dress from your favourite twenty one pilots era and please bring with you, your voice and your energy.
Our aim is to play for you every song from every Twenty One Pilots album over the course of the 4 hour gathering. In order for this mission to succeed, we need to move fast. With your energy, your voices and your help, together we might just be able to do this.
And remember, the sun will rise, and we will try again.
Always.
